required_preferences.fact: Silences work notifications after quarterly evening leadership meetings — checks email only when required for official meetings, otherwise avoids evening work communication

supersedes.fact: Silences work notifications after 5pm to focus on family — never checks email in the evenings

required_preferences.fact: Replaces all running, whether at home or traveling, with daily swimming or gentle yoga, avoiding any high-impact or weight-bearing exercise.

supersedes.fact: Runs indoors using hotel treadmills during Seattle site visits, maintaining her routine even while traveling, and only runs outdoors when at home.

required_preferences.fact: Arranges for her parents to babysit Ella during Max's out-of-town soccer tournament weekends — never leaves Ella with non-family sitters for overnight stays
Schedules weekly family meetings including her parents and children to coordinate caregiving responsibilities and household needs
Enrolls in one new certification course each year — never repeats courses already completed
Sets Sunday evenings for family movie night with homemade popcorn — never allows screens at the dinner table

persona: A single parent planning annual vacations for their two children
